nasb.text: Or let him rely on My protection, Let him make peace with Me, Let him make peace with Me.”

esv.text: Or let them lay hold of my protection, let them make peace with me, let them make peace with me.”

cnv.text: 除非他們抓住我作他們的避難所， 與我和好， 與我和好。”

ccb.text: 除非它们寻求我的庇护， 与我和好， 与我和好。”

csbs.text: 或者，让他们抓紧我的保障， 与我和好，与我和好吧！
